name: FLORENTINE GROTESCHI #21
description: Florentine Groteschi #21 is a vapor pope single-panel relic built around Mona Lisa and Vaporwave Medici Mall. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Amore, used here as the witness card. A wool-guild oath ledger with patron fingerprints gets pulled into a codon decoder sticker on a cold wallet, making the panel read like a corrupted receipt for belief, status, and patronage. Cosimo approves the lighting and ignores the crime. The generated insert, a low-res dove dropping governance ballots, acts as the modern clue; Gematria marks NOCAP at Σ 294.

attributes.value: a low-res dove dropping governance ballots

rarity.ranking_rule: Higher chess strength/rank is intentionally rarer: Pawn common, Knight/Bishop uncommon, Rook rare, Queen epic, King legendary.

board_position.position_rule: Deterministic per-token board square reserved for future game/use mechanics; independent of visible glyph placement.

chess_piece.allocation_rule: Weighted deterministic shuffled chess allocation by piece strength: {'Pawn': 560, 'Knight': 280, 'Bishop': 280, 'Rook': 168, 'Queen': 84, 'King': 29}
chess_piece.metadata_visibility: Hidden from OpenSea attributes; stored only in florentine_groteschi.hidden_traits.
chess_piece.visual_rule: A small unlabeled foreground chess glyph shows the chess-piece graphic with the piece name encoded underneath; that visible code is intentionally not serialized in metadata.

visible_text.history_now_bridge: MEDICI RECEIPT DRAMA: a wool-guild oath ledger with patron fingerprints gets pulled into a codon decoder sticker on a cold wallet. Amore reads the jump as patronage theater: who certifies the relic, who pays for belief, and who gets the receipt. Cosimo approves the lighting and ignores the crime.

artwork_breakdown.generated_insert: a low-res dove dropping governance ballots

tarocchi_fiorentini.allocation_rule: 14 complete 97-card sets across 1,401 tokens, plus 43 deterministic extras

artwork_breakdown.composition_read: Mona Lisa anchors the historical source. Amore supplies the witness logic. The low-res dove dropping governance ballots acts as the modern meme-object. The vapor pope palette and Vaporwave Medici Mall styling make the panel read like a corrupted Renaissance case file.

groteschi_explanation.plain_english: Read plainly: Mona Lisa is treated as evidence in a medici receipt drama. The old-world clue is a wool-guild oath ledger with patron fingerprints; the modern-world echo is a codon decoder sticker on a cold wallet. The joke is that patronage, holy paperwork, and marketplace verification are all status systems asking who gets believed.
groteschi_explanation.read_between_the_lines: The Amore card is not decorative; it tells you how to read the room. The old clue and the modern clue compete as evidence, so the panel becomes a custody argument about belief, status, and receipts. Cosimo approves the lighting and ignores the crime. The slang turns sacred authority into aura, patronage into clout economics, and marginalia into groupchat evidence.

slang_for_normal_plebs.translation_for_normal_plebs: did it perfectly; in this collection a fresco, saint, or relic can 'eat' like a viral post

treated as the greatest of all time, sometimes for stupid reasons
opponent or enemy; in this world a rival guild, collector, or saintly antagonist

hidden_solution.method: Split the visible marker into DNA triplets, translate each triplet through the genetic-code table, then read the amino-acid letters as the source Base name. Non-standard letters use documented stop/nearest triplet placeholders.

hidden_acrostic.method: Read the first character of each acrostic line; slashes are spaces.
